allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { node --version } else { "node: not found" }; $npm = \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($npm\) { npm --version } else { "npm: not found" }; $pnpm = \(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($pnpm\) { "pnpm: $\(pnpm --version\)" } else { "pnpm: not found" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "node:"; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "npm:"; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "pnpm:"; \(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "cargo-tauri:"; \(Get-Command cargo-tauri -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

Bash(cd "c:/Users/britto/PitStopX/src-tauri" && echo "=== time + time-macros versions ==="; cargo tree -i time-macros 2>&1 | head -8; echo "=== who requires what time ==="; grep -rE '^name = "time"|^version' ~/.cargo/registry/src/*/plist-1.9.0/Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== plist time req ==="; grep -A3 'dependencies.time\\|"time"' ~/.cargo/registry/src/*/plist-1.9.0/Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== tauri-utils value.rs:110-120 ==="; sed -n '108,120p' ~/.cargo/registry/src/*/tauri-utils-2.9.2/src/acl/value.rs 2>/dev/null)
